chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-3522 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of M.A 19618/16 3. For hearing of main case 05.08.2019. Mr. Fakhur Din Dahraj, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, A.A.G. Mr. Yasir Tahseen Talpur, Advocate for Respondent-Bank. -.-.-. Learned counsel for petitioner submits that he would be satisfied and would not press this petition if learned counsel for Respondents-Bank undertakes that action, if any, will be taken against the petitioner or his property in accordance with law. This proposal has been accepted by the learned counsel for Respondents-Bank, who submits that no coercive action save in accordance with law shall be taken against the petitioner. This petition is disposed of along with listed application in the terms as stated by the learned Counsel for Respondents-Bank. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
